detected_tonal_mode: dry crisis-procedural satire with humane hostage-negotiation pressure and sharp institutional absurdity

minor_findings.problem: Pippa and Brant are introduced as side-panel names before the Ink gives the reader a clear one-line handle on their social role.
minor_findings.why_it_matters: The later influencer-pressure layer is readable from context, but a new reader has to infer too much from panel behavior before those figures start shaping negotiation risk.
minor_findings.evidence: Pippa Lux waits in soft focus on a side panel. Brant Vee is already shouting without audio.
minor_findings.fix_direction: Add a compact appositive or feed-label cue establishing them as rival public-facing creators/commentators whose audiences can distort the crisis.

minor_findings.problem: Reality Architecture is locally evocative but still slightly under-bridged when Juno's technical capacity becomes plot-relevant.
minor_findings.why_it_matters: The reader understands Juno is dangerous to the feed, but not quite what kind of work or access Reality Architecture implies until later checksum behavior clarifies it.
minor_findings.evidence: Juno is junior Reality Architecture, which means she understands the feed well enough to be dangerous.
minor_findings.fix_direction: Give the role one concrete operational handle, such as feed scaffolds, moderation geometry, or packet routing, without opening a lore cupboard and letting the moths out.

minor_findings.problem: A few boolean variables appear to be set but not directly read later, even though their choices still affect consequence through other variables.
minor_findings.why_it_matters: Reader-facing consequence works, but as a training artifact it slightly blurs the distinction between meaningful state and bookkeeping residue.
minor_findings.evidence: safe_line, security_receded, and handoff_attempted are listed as variables; the major narrative consequences are carried by hostage_safety, security_pressure, sol_stability, mara_trust, and lucent_reframe.
minor_findings.fix_direction: Either add tiny conditional callbacks for those branch markers in contained_resolution or remove them from the promoted training variable list if they are only audit crumbs.

suggested_revisions: Add one early reader-facing role cue for Pippa and Brant before influencer_pressure.
Add one concrete operational cue for Reality Architecture before Juno's checksum action can matter.
Clean or use currently decorative branch marker booleans before promoting the sidecar as a model example.
acceptance_notes: The artifact meets B-level narrative quality: every relevant score is at least 4 and no major required revision remains.
